## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss sales pipeline, closed-loss follow-ups, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Refine approach for closed-loss follow-ups: focus on shorter, more direct messages and establish templates for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Prioritize follow-ups for timing-related closed-lost opportunities and those with potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [HubSpot migration in progress; need to address Joe's departure and potential backfill](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Team to align on marketing initiatives and improve documentation of ongoing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

## Topics

### Closed-Loss Follow-ups Strategy

  - [Current approach needs refinement: outputs are too long and generalized](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Kyle suggests creating 5 template versions for different scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Focus on shorter, more direct messages to grab attention and prompt responses](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Aim to complete at least half of the follow-up list today](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Prioritize timing-related closed-lost opportunities (est. 25% of total)](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### HubSpot Migration and Operations

  - [Joe leaving on August 1st; will complete migration and train team before departure](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Current setup: 3 HubSpot seats, CRM only (no marketing suite)](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Need to determine who needs deal ownership access](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Bridget to handle post-migration cleanup](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Potential need to backfill Joe's role with contractor or full-time hire](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### Marketing Initiatives and Documentation

  - [Team lacks visibility into current marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Need for better documentation and async communication of ongoing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Bridget suggests weekly Monday meetings with Jason and Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Request for more detailed, actionable plans beyond high-level strategy](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)

### ICP and Lead Scoring

  - [Daniel wants to implement a scoring system for ICP criteria](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Plan to add fields in opportunities for manual scoring (1-5 scale)](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [Criteria include leadership buy-in and other relevant factors](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Braze Account Update

  - [Meeting rescheduled to end of month](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Focus on organic growth, ramping up content production from 2-6 to 10+ blogs per month](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Exploring AI's role in SEO content production](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to create and send 5 follow-up templates to Kyle for review](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Kyle and Bruno to meet with Joe for individual HubSpot training sessions](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Team to meet with Jason next week to review marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Implement ICP scoring system in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Bridget to discuss backfilling Joe's role with Jason upon his return](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Schedule weekly Monday meetings with Jason, Kyle, and Bridget to align on marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dN3yF42GsM_7qwvUsB9zLjxkkiL38C-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
